countries.notes: Anchor. IN 701 issued Oct 2024 effective Oct 2026. BCB VASP authorization required.
countries.why_now: BCB IN 701 authorization mandatory by 31 Oct 2026; most VASPs unauthorized. (ANCHOR)
countries.lead_offer: BCB-authorization technical pack + custody attestation + DREX interop
countries.competitors_weak: Big 4 BR + Mattos Filho own relationships but no on-chain depth

countries.notes: Net-new regime late 2025. Massive non-compliance gap (no licensed entities yet). Country still on FATF watchlist.
countries.why_now: PVARA registration under Virtual Assets Act 2025 closes 30 Nov 2026; net-new regime.
countries.first_touch: Verify regime is operational before significant outreach investment

countries.notes: Largest MiCA market by deal size. CASP transition window closes Jul 2026.
countries.why_now: KMAG→MiCA transition ends 30 Jun 2026; ~25 KWG-licensed custodians migrating to CASP.
countries.lead_offer: ART/EMT issuance review + custody attestation + smart-contract audit
countries.competitors_weak: Big 4 dominate audit; lack on-chain depth

countries.notes: PSAN registration converting to CASP; significant in-scope population.
countries.why_now: PSAN→CASP transition closes 30 Jun 2026; ~110 PSAN registrations need upgrade.
countries.lead_offer: CASP application support + Travel Rule wiring + smart-contract audit
countries.first_touch: ADAN webinar + AMF Reg Lab engagement

countries.notes: Coinbase EU + Kraken EU + Gemini EU based. High institutional depth.
countries.why_now: CASP applications under MiCA close 30 Jun 2026; ~15-25 high-value non-EU passporters in pipeline.
countries.lead_offer: CASP application technical attestation + smart-contract audit + custody attestation
countries.competitors_weak: Big 4 Ireland strong on audit but on-chain forensics gap

countries.notes: Stablecoin licensing Aug 2025 live; OTC + custody bills 2026.

countries.framework: Capital Markets Law amendment + CASP registration
countries.notes: CMB CASP regime live; 47 platforms in registration; biggest in-scope migration outside EU.
countries.why_now: SPK CASP authorization wave closes Mar 2026; ~47 platforms in migration.
countries.lead_offer: Smart-contract audit + custody attestation + AML/Travel Rule wiring
countries.competitors_weak: Local Big-4 offer audit but no on-chain capability
countries.first_touch: Joint webinar with Esin or BTS Partners

countries.notes: Stablecoin + custody rules consultation closing 2026; gateway live.
NET-NEW regime live Jan 2026. Massive gray-market base entering compliance.
countries.why_now: MoF/SBV VASP framework live 1 Jan 2026; massive grey-market base entering phased registration.
countries.lead_offer: VASP-application readiness + smart-contract audit + Travel Rule wiring
countries.competitors_weak: CertiK already audits many VN projects — strong proof-of-concept
countries.first_touch: VBA event + upsell existing VN project clients

countries.framework: ISA 2025 (Investment & Securities Act) + SEC VASP rules
countries.notes: ISA 2025 enacted; VASP registration; SEC takes lead.
countries.why_now: SEC VASP registration under ISA 2025 closes 30 Jun 2026; most exchanges unregistered.
countries.lead_offer: VASP-application technical pack + smart-contract audit + naira-stablecoin review
countries.competitors_weak: No local crypto-tech bench at any Big 4
countries.first_touch: SiBAN joint event + named exchange direct outreach

countries.notes: VASP Bill passed 2025 with phased implementation; supplementary regs late 2026.
Largest historical EU VASP-licensing hub; ~500+ legacy VASPs migrating to CASP.
countries.why_now: MiCA→CASP cut-over 30 Jun 2026; ~580 legacy VCEOs consolidating into 30-60 CASP authorizations.
countries.lead_offer: Productized CASP-readiness pack for the long tail + premium bundle for serious migrants
countries.competitors_weak: No vendor has bandwidth for 100s of legacy VASPs

countries.notes: KNF VASP transition; significant retail market.
countries.why_now: MiCA→CASP cut-over 30 Jun 2026; ~1,500 RVCA entries face authorization or wind-down.
countries.lead_offer: Productized readiness + smart-contract audit + PLN-stablecoin pilot review
countries.competitors_weak: Big 4 PL + legal own incumbent relationships but light on tech
countries.first_touch: Polish Blockchain Association event + Zonda direct

countries.notes: DAP bill late-2025 introduced; transition runway. May land in 18-24mo bucket.
GENIUS in enforcement phase. Net-new licensing limited; biggest CertiK angle is stablecoin audit + state-VASP MTL.
2025 amendments expand investor protection. Outside 6-18mo sweet spot.
VARA + ADGM mature; expanding scope but not net-new licensing window.
Phase 2 token classification rules forthcoming; institutional access expanding.
VDA tax + AML only; no licensing
